commit.message:
refactor(workflow-gateway): remove unused logger and dryRun params

The FileSystemWorkflowGateway no longer needs logger or dryRun
parameters since dry-run logic is handled at the command layer
(copilot-setup.ts). This removes dead code and simplifies the API:

- Simplified constructor: FileSystemWorkflowGateway(cwd?)
- Simplified factory: createWorkflowGateway(cwd?)
- Updated callers in copilot-setup.ts and init.ts
- Removed unused consola import

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(copilot-setup): address additional PR review comments

- Fix createWorkflowGateway call in init.ts: pass (consola, false, cwd)
  instead of just (cwd) to match new signature
- Add default value for logger param in FileSystemNpmrcGateway constructor
  so tests can instantiate without args
- Remove dryRun param from MockNpmrcGateway to match real NpmrcGateway
  interface (dryRun is handled by gateway constructor, not method param)
- Remove dual-layer dry-run guard: gateway no longer checks dryRun since
  command layer already guards and skips gateway call in dry-run mode

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(copilot-setup): address PR review comments for dry-run mode

- Make checkAndPromptAgentShell dry-run aware: skip writeNpmrc call and
  log [DRY-RUN] message when dryRun=true (consistent with ruleset handling)
- Remove duplicate dry-run messages: skip gateway calls in dry-run mode
  instead of calling gateway then logging again at command level
- Update MockNpmrcGateway interface to include dryRun parameter to match
  the real NpmrcGateway interface signature
- Fix test assertion: 'should not write .npmrc when adding agent-shell'
  now correctly asserts writeNpmrc was NOT called in dry-run mode

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Enforce Claude synthesis-only: exclude from debate, cap I/O to 500 tokens

- cognitive_orchestrator.py: Debate engine now uses _get_debate_models()
  which filters by MODEL_DEBATE_TIERS, excluding claude-sonnet-4.6
- cognitive_gateway.py: _call_anthropic caps input to ~500 tokens (2000 chars)
  and output to min(max_tokens, 500)
- cognitive_gateway.py: _PROVIDER_MAX_OUTPUT['anthropic'] = 500

Claude now:
  - Participates in Phase 1 (initial structured  reused for Round 1output)
  - Excluded from debate Rounds 2+ (synthesis-only model)
  - Input capped at ~500 tokens, output capped at 500 tokens
  - context_window=200000 (needed for gateway token governor math only)
  - max_output_tokens=500 in registry

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Merge branch 'main' into claude/add-dry-run-to-copilot-setup

Resolve conflicts between dry-run feature (logger/dryRun params) and
PR #239 changes (cwd parameter for config loading). Combined both:
- createWorkflowGateway now accepts (logger, dryRun, cwd) parameters
- copilot-setup command passes targetDir as cwd to workflow gateway

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix model failures: increase token budgets, fix context windows, add vision support

Root cause: Models failed in Round 2 with 'empty or invalid structured output' due to:
- ROUND_HARD_CAPS too low (R2=140 tokens for 11-section structured output)
- NVIDIA models had context_window=1000 (should be 131072)
- Claude had context_window=500 (should be 200000)
- _PROVIDER_MAX_OUTPUT capped NVIDIA=1000, Anthropic=500
- _call_anthropic had hardcoded 500-token cap and stripped vision content

Fixes (all models preserved, no logic changes):
- ensemble_schemas.py: ROUND_HARD_CAPS {1:600, 2:500, 3:400}, budget 15000
4000
200000, supports_vision=True
4096
- cognitive_gateway.py: _call_anthropic vision/PDF support via Anthropic native format
- cognitive_gateway.py: _call_gemini vision support via inline_data format
- cognitive_gateway.py: _call_qwen passes vision content through for VL models
4096
- multimodal_auditor.py: Added claude-sonnet-4.6 to vision/PDF capability matrix
3000 with
  pre-wrap, added assumptions/risks sections to structured round view

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: rename module to dev, add Run/Stop targets, fix .gitignore

commit.message:
fix(init): align setup-node SHA with scaffold templates and fix INIT_RESOLVED_VERSIONS comment

- Update setup-node SHA from v6.1.0 (49933ea) to v6.3.0 (53b8394) to match
  all scaffold template workflows (copilot-with-react, copilot-with-citty,
  copilot-with-fastify)
- Fix INIT_RESOLVED_VERSIONS comment: the canonical copilot-setup-steps.yml
  shares checkout, setup-python, and mise-action — not setup-node

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(init): correct misleading comment about path.resolve() security claim

path.resolve() normalizes relative segments but does not prevent directory
traversal — update comment to accurately describe what it does.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: remove unnecessary comments

Remove redundant inline comments where code is self-documenting:
- init.ts: function name already describes workflow generation
- init.test.ts: assertion clearly expresses intent

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(candidate-builder): use unique action keys for run steps

Run-step candidates now use 'run:<type>' (e.g., 'run:npm', 'run:pip')
as their action identifier instead of empty string. This prevents
mergeCandidates() from collapsing multiple package manager install
steps into a single entry.

- Update buildInstallCandidatesFromPackageManagers() to set action
- Update workflow-generator to detect run: prefix for run steps
- Add test for multiple run-step candidates not collapsing

Fixes PR #239 review comment about install step deduplication.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
map: auto-route NS <-> Iberian/Med via Bay of Biscay + Gibraltar

Add NS_TO_ATLANTIC and GIB_TO_MED lookup tables + smart routing in
seaLaneWaypoints() to avoid land for any North Sea <-> Lisbon or
North Sea <-> Mediterranean route pair, without needing 100+ manual
entries. Routes go: NS port -> Ushant -> Bay of Biscay -> Cape St
Vincent -> Gibraltar (if Med) -> Med port.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use authenticated user displayName when joining rooms on mobile

RoomJoinScreen initialized displayName before user state loaded from
Firebase Auth, resulting in empty string → 'Guest' fallback. Added
LaunchedEffect to update displayName when user state arrives.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: direct call fullscreen and remote video height

- ActiveCallScreen: add fullscreen state, requestFullscreen/exitFullscreen helpers
- ActiveCallScreen: pass all fullscreen callbacks to VideoGrid (was missing)
- VideoGrid: single-tile fills container height (no aspect-ratio constraint)
- VideoGrid: alignContent 'stretch' for single tile layout
- Localized remaining hardcoded strings (Setting up, Call ended, Go Back)
- Added callEnded i18n key (en + ru)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: set ferry role for traveling ships

Caravels in transit (chasing passengers) never docked so role was never
set. Now role is derived and stored in the traveling-ship metrics update,
so the dashboard badge shows regardless of dock state.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: localize Calls tab, in-call controls (Mute/Cancel/Camera), Unknown fallback

- AppShell: Calls tab label now uses t.callsTab
- ActiveCallScreen: Mute/Unmute, Cancel, Camera Off/On use t.* keys
- ActiveCallScreen: Unknown callee fallback uses t.unknown
- Added callsTab, cancel, cameraOff, cameraOn i18n keys (en + ru)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: localize all remaining hardcoded English strings

Web:
- OutgoingCallScreen: call states, Go Back, Unknown → use t.* keys
- AppShell: Search placeholder, no-contacts message, Remove button → t.*
- LocationPanel: locationUpdated key now defined
- Added 12 new i18n keys to translations.ts (en + ru)

Mobile:
- OptionsScreen: background location toast → stringResource

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add role field to AutopilotShipState

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: complete ferry role behavior

- Guard cargo scanning behind !isFerry — Caravels never scan/buy cargo
- Don't penalise ferry cyclesIdle when covering a port (log ⚓ instead)
- Exclude ferries from fleet-management auto-sell
- Fleet buy prefers Caravel when ferryCount < activePortCount
- Dashboard: show ⛵ ferry / 📦 multi badge next to ship name
- Fix transiting_to_buy phase label for ferry-chase (⛵ → port)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix newline rendering in group/cluster description fields

Split description text on newlines into separate Line objects
so ratatui renders them as actual line breaks. A single Span
does not interpret embedded newlines.

commit.message:
feat: idle ships chase passengers at nearby ports

When an idle ship with passenger capacity finds no cargo opportunity, it now
scans available passengers at other ports (up to 3 hops away) and dispatches
toward the best one (highest bid/distance ratio). Only chases passengers with
>10 minutes remaining to avoid wasted travel.

On arrival the ship resets to idle so the normal boarding logic picks them up.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Use real terminal cursor in parliament general settings editor

Replace styled-span cursor simulation with f.set_cursor_position()
to show a real blinking terminal cursor. The previous approach was
hidden by the table row_highlight_style background color.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: read location interval and history days from Firestore AppConfig

- Fetch locationIntervalMinutes and locationHistoryDays from appConfig/settings
- Enforce strict minimum interval between Firestore writes (skip early updates)
- Set minUpdateIntervalMillis equal to interval (was half, causing early deliveries)
- Falls back to Constants defaults if Firestore fetch fails

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add refresh button and paginated history (10 items, load more on scroll)

- Mobile: ViewModel tracks page size, hasMore, loadMore/refreshHistory methods
- Mobile: refresh icon button in history header, auto-load-more at list bottom
- Web: fetch all history upfront, display 10 initially, infinite scroll loads more
- Web: refresh button re-fetches from Firestore and resets to first page
- Added 'refresh' i18n string for both platforms (en/ru)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add temporary red highlight pin when selecting history location

- Web: red DivIcon marker at zIndex 2000 appears on click, moves on next click
- Mobile: red circle overlay marker rendered last (on top) at selected GeoPoint
- Both platforms: pin appears when clicking any history item, map flies to location

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Use handle_text_input_key for arrow key support in text inputs

Convert backup prompts, view save name, role filter, and overview
field popup filter from simple push/pop to handle_text_input_key
with cursor tracking. This adds Left/Right arrow key navigation
in these text inputs. Cursor position is now visually rendered
in backup prompt popups.

commit.message:
Add Parliament Settings tab with Groups and General sub-tabs

- Groups sub-tab: tree view of groups/clusters with CRUD operations
  - n: new group, a: add cluster, e/Enter: edit, d/x: delete
  - Group editor popup (title, description)
  - Cluster editor popup (title, url, description, localUrl, type, hide flags)
- General sub-tab: form editor for parliament thresholds and URLs
  - outOfDate, esQueryTimeout, noPackets, lowDiskSpace, removeIssues, etc.
  - Enter to edit fields, Ctrl+S to save all settings
- API: CRUD endpoints for groups, clusters, and general settings
- Context-sensitive help overlay for Settings tab

feat: embedded map views with merged pins, localized labels

Web (Leaflet/OpenStreetMap):
- Interactive map in LocationPanel with merged coordinate pins
- Sequential same-location entries (within 50m) merged into one pin
  showing time range (e.g., '10:00 - 10:20')
- Current location: blue marker, history: gray markers
- Leaflet prefix hidden, OSM attribution kept
- 18 unit tests for map utilities (Haversine, merging, formatting)

Mobile (osmdroid/OpenStreetMap):
- Embedded map in LocationViewScreen with merged pins
- Same merging logic as web (Haversine 50m threshold)
- Current: purple marker, history: default red
- 14 unit tests for merging logic

Both platforms:
- Map pin labels localized (Current/History in en/ru)
- Added missing i18n strings (location, currentLocation, etc.)
- Fixed duplicate key crash in LazyColumn (use doc ID not timestamp)
- Fixed duplicate R import

repository.name: openapi2zig
repository.description: A tool for generating clients and contracts in Zig from OpenAPI specifications

commit.message:
fix: GPS tracking, real walking routes via OSRM, mobile search bar layout

- GPS: switch getCurrentPosition → watchPosition for continuous tracking
- GPS: btn-locate toggles tracking on/off with pulsing marker animation
- GPS: increased timeout 5s → 15s for mobile GPS
- Navigation: replace straight line with real walking routes via OSRM foot routing
- Navigation: shows real distance + walking time (e.g. 1.2km · 15 min)
- Navigation: auto-reroute if user moves >50m from route start
- Navigation: auto-arrive detection at <30m from destination
- Navigation: renamed buildNavRoute() to avoid conflict with Route Builder buildRoute()
- Mobile: search bar no longer overlaps pin button in portrait orientation
- HTTPS: added nginx + certbot SSL for https://54-38-65-155.sslip.io

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: Update website to reflect all supported OpenAPI versions

- Update hero description to mention all supported versions
- Remove outdated 'coming soon' message for Swagger v2.0
- Update Current Capabilities section with full version support
- Mark all version parsers as complete (✅)
- Add OpenAPI v3.1 to capabilities list

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add upgrade migrate + promotion logic

- migrate: rewrites registry to assign non-template items to a package
  source, enabling channel-to-package migration (e.g. frontier → main + packages)
- promotion: detects package→template overlap during upgrade, auto-cleans
  package field and packages[] array
- migrateRegistry: pure function for testable registry rewriting
- 48 tests (10 new: 5 promotion + 5 migrate)
- Bumps upgrade skill to 0.5.0, registry to 0.16.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Dashboard redesign + order book buy/sell integration

Dashboard:
- 5 KPI cards: Treasury, Cargo in Transit (sell value), PAX in Transit,
  Net Profit, Total Assets (treasury + cargo cost + pax bids)
- Fleet summary strip showing docked/traveling counts and upkeep breakdown
- Autopilot card: clean header with status/profit/cycles, table-based ship
  list with lifetime profit, cargo, pax, and phase columns
- Activity log shows seconds, shows 30 entries
- KpiCard replaces StatCard with more accent colors (emerald, indigo, red)
- Removed StarIcon/reputation card — upkeep moved to strip

Autopilot order book integration (warehouse-based):
- Warehouse sell scan: try filling open buy orders first (best price first)
  before falling back to NPC sell; tracks combined revenue + profit
- Warehouse buy scan: check sell orders at port alongside NPC availability;
  fills cheapest sell orders first, falls back to NPC buy if none available
- Both use marketApi.getOrders + marketApi.fillOrder

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update clinic UI and navigation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Volatility Term Structure & VRP research notebook

QuantConnect Cloud Research Notebook with 9 sections covering:
- IV term-structure slope extraction (front vs back month ATM IV)
- Volatility Risk Premium (VRP = IV - RV) computation
- HMM regime augmentation (baseline vs augmented model comparison)
- Standalone VRP trading signals (A/B/C) with backtests
- VIX orthogonalization validity tests
- Walk-forward validation (4 folds, 2020-2024)
- Final summary with Object Store index and ensemble export

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add unique ship naming — 140 nautical names, auto-rename on buy and cycle sweep

- SHIP_NAMES list of 140 evocative nautical/merchant vessel names
- pickShipName() picks next unused name (avoids duplicates, falls back to 'II' suffix)
- isDefaultName() detects single-letter names, 'Ship', 'Vessel', 'New Ship'
- On buy: immediately renames the new ship before logging
- Each cycle: renames one default-named docked ship (one per cycle to limit API calls)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: color scheme batch 2 — text emphasis, desaturated accents, elevation system (#72)

* feat: color scheme batch 2 — text emphasis, desaturated accents, elevation system

Implements three color system improvements for dark mode:

Issue #61: Dark mode text emphasis hierarchy
- Added 3-level text emphasis hierarchy using Material Design opacity levels
- high (87%): headings, primary text — 15.8:1 contrast (WCAG AAA)
- medium (60%): secondary labels, descriptions — 10.3:1 (AAA)
- low (38%): disabled, hints, placeholders — 6.2:1 (AA)
- Light mode equivalents for consistency

Issue #62: Desaturated dark mode accent colors
- Added violet-soft (#a080e8) and orange-soft (#ffb347) for reduced vibration
- Both meet WCAG AAA contrast on #00002a background (8.4:1 and 13.2:1)
- Updated --cdn-color-accent to use soft variant; --cdn-color-primary keeps original for interaction

Issue #63: Dark mode elevation system
- 4-level elevation ramp for progressive lightening (#0a0a2e → #22225a)
- Improves depth perception in dark mode without harsh borders
- Updated bg and surface tokens to use elevation system

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs(squad): Lyren — PR #71 review + color scheme batch 2

- Reviewed PR #71 (Roadmap page) — approved from design perspective
- Implemented color scheme batch 2 (issues #61, #62, #63)
- Updated history with both tasks
- Wrote decision for batch 2 implementation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Dark mode: cosmic navy tones (#00002a, #200050, #30006a)

Fix capacity exceeded and cargo-not-found sell failures

- Use freeCapacity (actual remaining space) instead of full capacity when
  buying, preventing 'Capacity exceeded' errors on ships that already have
  cargo in their hold
- When selling at destination, read actual ship inventory quantity instead
  of plan.quantity to prevent 'Cargo not found' on state desync
- In idle phase, detect leftover cargo and attempt to sell at current port
  or dispatch to best sell route before doing normal idle scanning

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix crash on old autopilot state missing new fields

Merge saved state with blank() on load so profitHistory, treasuryHistory,
fleetMgmt, cyclesRun always have defaults. Add null-coalescing guards in
runCycle and runFleetManagement for backwards compat with states saved
before these fields were introduced.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fleet mgmt, profit/treasury history, warehouse buy, 10s cycle, SSE passengers

- CYCLE_MS 30s → 10s for faster passenger boarding
- World events SSE in worker: instant board on passenger_request_created
- Warehouse stockpiling: buy ≤100 units of ≤2 cheap goods per cycle
- Fleet management: auto-sell stuck ships, auto-buy to rebalance pax/cargo ratio
- Profit history: per-cycle snapshots on AutopilotState (200 rolling)
- Treasury history: per-cycle snapshots alongside profit history
- Dashboard: profit chart + restored treasury chart (both from snapshots)
- Fleet mgmt toggle in dashboard (enable/disable auto buy/sell)
- Fix: boardedPaxBid now added to profitAccrued at boarding time
- Fix: all ship phase resets preserve cyclesIdle/lifetimeProfit/etc metrics

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
